title: RBI Seeks Public Feedback on Standardised Approach for Counterparty Credit Risk (SA-CCR)
description:
RBI has released draft amendment directions on the Standardised Approach for Counterparty Credit Risk after reviewing legal and regulatory developments. Stakeholders have been invited to submit comments by July 1, 2026.
The post RBI Seeks Public Feedback on Standardised Approach for Counterparty Credit Risk (SA-CCR) appeared first on TaxGuru.
